cards.back: A set of values that guide the Agile framework, emphasizing individual and team self-organization, working software, customer collaboration, and responding to change
A structured approach to Agile project management, focusing on roles, ceremonies, and artifacts such as the Product Backlog and Sprint Backlog
A linear, sequential approach to project management, where each stage is completed before moving to the next one, with a focus on predictive planning and control
A set of guiding principles that aim to minimize waste, maximize value, and optimize flow in software development and delivery, emphasizing continuous improvement
A visual system for managing work, emphasizing continuous flow, limiting work in progress, and delivering value to customers in small increments
